rankings.why_it_matters: Shows India's targeted approach to securing critical minerals and components for its EV and renewable energy goals while managing strategic risks.

rankings.title: Start-up salary hikes recover unevenly as AI talent commands premiums
rankings.india_relevance: Analyses wage trends in India's startup ecosystem, highlighting a new skill divide.
rankings.why_it_matters: Reveals how the AI boom is creating a two-tier job market within tech, influencing talent flows and startup burn rates.

rankings.title: India displaces China as largest exporter of cotton products to US in 2025
rankings.india_relevance: Reports a significant shift in global textile trade dynamics benefiting India.
rankings.why_it_matters: Highlights India's gains from trade realignment, boosting a labor-intensive sector with positive employment and export revenue implications.

rankings.title: India developing indigenous capability to detect unregistered virtual asset service providers: FATF report
rankings.india_relevance: Details India's progress on a critical fintech regulatory tool as per global watchdog FATF.
rankings.why_it_matters: Shows proactive steps to monitor crypto/fintech ecosystems for illicit flows, balancing innovation with financial integrity.

rankings.title: Qualcomm Ventures eyes India startups to build low-cost AI for the world
rankings.india_relevance: Highlights strategic focus of global tech investor on Indian AI startups for global solutions.
rankings.why_it_matters: Signals India's evolving role in the global AI value chain—not just as a market, but as a lab for cost-effective innovation.

rankings.title: Long days, longer nights: Seafarers trapped in West Asia navigate a war
rankings.india_relevance: Humanizes the impact of the Hormuz crisis on Indian seafarers, a key workforce in global shipping.
rankings.why_it_matters: Exposes the human capital risk and operational challenges for a critical profession, affecting remittances and maritime logistics.

rankings.title: SBI ties up with MUFG Bank to finance M&A, aviation and real estate deals
rankings.india_relevance: Announces a major cross-border partnership between India's largest bank and a Japanese giant.
rankings.why_it_matters: Facilitates larger cross-border capital flows and deal-making for Indian corporates, especially in capital-intensive sectors.

rankings.title: Manali Petrochemicals suspends operations at one of its Chennai units after CPCL halts propylene supply
rankings.india_relevance: Shows a direct supply chain breakdown in Indian specialty chemicals due to refinery disruptions.
rankings.why_it_matters: Illustrates how refinery shifts to produce more LPG (prioritized) can cripple downstream industries, causing localised job and economic loss.

rankings.title: A revision of GDP and its implications
rankings.india_relevance: Analyses a methodological change in calculating India's GDP.
rankings.why_it_matters: Understanding base year/calculation changes is crucial for accurate economic analysis, investment decisions, and policy evaluation.

rankings.title: BARC developing Bharat Small Modular Reactors at a cost of ₹5,960 crore
rankings.india_relevance: Details India's indigenous nuclear energy technology development.
rankings.why_it_matters: Highlights a strategic long-term bet on clean, baseload power independence, relevant for energy security and climate goals.

rankings.title: RBI amends prudential norms on capital adequacy
rankings.india_relevance: Reports a change in banking regulation by the Reserve Bank of India.
rankings.why_it_matters: Changes in capital rules affect bank lending capacity, profitability, and stability, influencing credit growth in the economy.
